productDisplayName: Wills Lifestyle Women Blue & Brown Wallet
description: Style Note Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from wills lifestyle. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Product Details Brown wallet crafted from genuine leather, has a flap style three-fold opening with a press button closure A blue strip running along the upper for style Six card holders, two insert pockets, two pockets with press button closures and an id holder  Material and Care Leather Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Size  Dimensions : 22.5 cm x 9 cm
